features: These bristles will glide through any hair type combing out tangles effortlessly
Use to smooth and detangle wet or dry hair
Suitable for all lengths and textures
Ultra-soft bristles glide through tangles with ease, minimizes pain and protects against split ends and breakage
description: Pink Back Updo hairstyle is perfect for brushing back hair to create all the volume that any up-do needs. Completed with an ideal blend of boar bristles for ultimate tension in the hair to create maximum volume. Directions Hold the brush, brush hair back to create volume, use daily for desired hair look and style.

specifications_table.Benefits: Detangles hair with reduced breakage, Creates volume and tension for up-dos
